critical.mandate: Story files must include YAML frontmatter with key, status, dependencies
Check web access availability if story references external APIs

step.title: Select Story
step.ask: Which story do you want to detail? (provide story key from sprint plan or epics)

step.title: Web Access Guard
step.check: Check if web tools available for API documentation lookup

step.title: Elaborate Story
step.action: Expand acceptance criteria with detailed test conditions
Add technical notes from architecture context

step.title: Definition of Done
step.action: Append DoD checklist: all AC met, tests pass, code reviewed, docs updated

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate story file with YAML frontmatter (key, title, epic, status: ready-for-dev, sprint, assignee, depends_on) and sections: Acceptance Criteria, Technical Notes, Subtasks, Definition of Done.
